style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust-coloured accents. A clean architectural cross-section of several broad horizontal layers stacked one on another, like strata, suggesting a technology stack: a wide base layer, two middle layers, and a top layer, each a simple band carrying a few small node motifs and connecting lines. Calm, archival, and confident. Wide cover aspect. No text, no logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust-coloured accents. A clean architectural cross-section of several broad horizontal layers stacked one on another, like strata, suggesting a technology stack: a wide base layer, two middle layers, and a top layer, each a simple band carrying a few small node motifs and connecting lines. Calm, archival, and confident. Wide cover aspect. No text, no logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
